name: Stat
description: Single-value metric display with prominent typography. Use inside a labelled wrapper (a captioned figure, Card, or Stack with Text label) for at-a-glance KPIs.

members.name: size
members.description: Visual size of the metric value.

members.name: trend
members.description: Optional direction-of-change indicator. Drives the value's color via a data attribute; consumers may render a trend arrow as inline children.

usageHints: Use Stat for at-a-glance KPIs (counts, percentages, money). For multi-dimensional data, use a Table or Card.
Set size=lg for hero stats, md for dashboard grids, sm for inline annotations.

Wrap Stat with a Text label below (e.g.,
{n}Components
) — Stat itself is the value, not the captioned tile.
trend recolors the value; inline an arrow as children when direction matters: <Stat trend=up>+12%</Stat>.
